input_intent: gNB-CU has to prepare and send F1AP "UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST" message to the candidate gNB-DU and candidate gNB-DU has to respond with F1AP "UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE" message and this message has to be handled on gNB-CU for Inter-gNB DU LTM Handover Procedure

validation_policy.messages: Each message in the matched mapping rule must appear in Call_Flow. Additional messages in the template are not flagged.
validation_policy.information_elements: Each IE listed in the mapping rule for a step must exist in Information_Elements and match the rule's ASN.1 structure (nested optional fields may be skipped). Additional IEs in the template are not flagged.
validation_policy.type_fields: Mapping 'type' entries are ASN.1 constructors and type references (structure), not concrete F1AP/RRC instance values.
validation_policy.human_resolution: Ambiguities are shown to a human. Template updates and prompt regeneration happen only after the user supplies resolutions (e.g. via resolve_self_learning_ambiguities). Automated checks do not apply template edits.

llm_ambiguity_review.raw_response_preview: {"reviews":[{"id":"missing_ie_1_ltminformationsetup","verdict":"confirm","reason":"The required IE 'LTMInformation-Setup' is missing entirely from Information_Elements."},{"id":"ie_field_mismatch_1_ltmconfigurationidmappinglist_ltmcellid","verdict":"confirm","reason":"The 'lTMCellID' field is empty and does not match the expected NRCGI ASN.1 structure."},{"id":"ie_field_mismatch_1_ltmconfigurationidmappinglist_ltmconfigurationid","verdict":"confirm","reason":"The 'lTMConfigurationID' field is empty and does not match the expected LTMConfigurationID ASN.1 structure."},{"id":"missing_ie_2_ltmconfiguration","verdict":"confirm","reason":"The required IE 'LTMConfiguration' is missing entirely from Information_Elements."}]}

self_learning.next_step_if_ambiguous: Collect answers keyed by each ambiguity id; call validate_template_with_mapping_rules or pipeline resolve path with user_resolutions to write the template, then regenerate the code prompt.
